name: save-to-spotify
description: Create polished audio episodes with TTS narration, rich timelines, cover images, and save them to Spotify via the save-to-spotify CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Create audio episodes and save them to Spotify
interface.longDescription: Create polished audio content from user-provided sources, including TTS narration, editorial structure, cover art, show notes, and rich Spotify timeline companions. Use the save-to-spotify CLI to upload finished episodes, manage shows and episodes, and update timeline metadata.
defaultPrompt: Create a podcast episode from these notes
Save this audio file to Spotify
Add timeline chapters to this episode
